STranslate_Plugin_Dictionary_ECDICT_Dict: Path to ECDICT SQLite database file; uses plugin directory default if relative or empty
STranslate_Plugin_Dictionary_ECDICT_Lemm: Path to lemma.en.txt for word form lemmatization (e.g. gave -> give)
STranslate_Plugin_Dictionary_ECDICT_Enab: Automatically reduce word variants to their base form
Try stripword fuzzy matching when exact match fails
STranslate_Plugin_Dictionary_ECDICT_MaxF: Maximum number of results to return during fuzzy matching
STranslate_Plugin_Dictionary_ECDICT_Disp: Choose what to show in query results
STranslate_Plugin_Dictionary_ECDICT_Show: Show Source Info (Collins Stars, Frequency etc.)
